messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

message.content: This section contains only the heading "游戏内容与系统" (Game Content and Systems) and lacks substantive content. It can only address a broad topic question about the general category of game mechanics, features, or system architecture. It provides no information to answer questions regarding specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. No factual data or descriptive text is present in this excerpt.
